label: Algebra
shortDescription: Equations, functions, polynomials, exponents, and the language of symbolic mathematics.
modulesDescription: Read the algebra chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogDescription: Master algebra foundations, equations and inequalities, functions and graphs, polynomials and factoring, exponents radicals and logarithms, plus complex numbers and sequences — with detailed explanations, worked examples, common mistakes, and practice questions.
courseDescription: A complete introductory algebra course covering the language of algebra (variables, expressions, equations, inequalities, order of operations), solving linear quadratic and systems of equations plus inequalities, functions their domains ranges graphs transformations inverses, polynomials monomials binomials factoring division and rational expressions, exponents radicals rational exponents exponential functions and logarithms, and advanced topics including complex numbers, quadratic formula, discriminant, and arithmetic/geometric sequences. Features ELI5 intuition, step-by-step worked examples, common pitfalls, and hundreds of practice problems.

topics.title: Foundations of Algebra
topics.description: Variables, expressions, equations, inequalities, and order of operations — the language of symbolic math.

topics.title: Linear Equations & Systems
topics.description: Solving linear equations and systems of linear equations in one or more variables.

topics.title: Inequalities & Absolute Value
topics.description: Absolute value, linear and quadratic inequalities, and compound inequality techniques.

topics.title: Quadratic Equations
topics.description: Quadratic equations, the quadratic formula, the discriminant, and rational equations.

topics.title: Functions & Graphs
topics.description: Function notation, domain and range, linear and quadratic graphs, transformations, and inverses.

topics.title: Polynomials & Factoring
topics.description: Polynomial structure, factoring patterns, division, and rational expressions.

topics.title: Exponents, Radicals & Logarithms
topics.description: Exponent rules, roots, rational exponents, exponential functions, logarithms, and radical equations.

topics.title: Complex Numbers & Sequences
topics.description: Complex numbers, the imaginary unit, and arithmetic and geometric sequences.
